settings.title: Mouth-blown in Istanbul, since 2022.
settings.lead: Seym Glass Studio is a contemporary atelier shaping glass by breath and hand, in the historical Çengelköy district. Every piece carries the trace of its making — and the silence of a small studio that refuses to scale.
settings.atelier_text:
Founded in 2022, Seym is the work of a small team of glassblowers committed to one principle: character over perfection. We choose the slower path — mouth-blown crystal, finished by master hands, refused if it does not carry presence.

Each piece is named, never numbered. Each series is closed at twelve. Nothing returns.
